title: "Billions Club Live With Bad Bunny: A Concert Film" Premieres Globally on Spotify
detail: Spotify releases "Billions Club Live With Bad Bunny: A Concert Film" globally on April 8, bringing the March 7 Tokyo performance to fans worldwide. The 42-minute film, directed by Stillz, captures the energy of Bad Bunny's first-ever concert in Asia — performed at Tipstar Dome Chiba in front of 2,300+ top Spotify fans — and features hits including "Tití Me Preguntó," "Yonaguni," "NUEVAYoL," "EoO," and a unique salsa rendition of "MIA." The film includes exclusive commentary from Bad Bunny reflecting on his career and global fan connection. The concert was notable for VIP attendees including Blackpink's Lisa and artist Takashi Murakami, and a surprise appearance by Jowell & Randy on "Safaera." This marks the first time a Latin artist headlined a Spotify Billions Club Live event in Asia.
